allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8764 -ErrorAction Stop\).OwningProcess -ErrorAction Stop | Stop-Process -Force -PassThru | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, SessionId)
PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8764/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $_" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8764 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess, State; Write-Output "---"; Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8764 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime)
PowerShell(Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8764 -ErrorAction Stop\).OwningProcess -ErrorAction Stop | Stop-Process -Force -PassThru | Select-Object Id, ProcessName)
